compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create ticket-benchmark.sh with threshold-based exit codes
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-benchmark.sh` that:
1. Accepts `-n <count>` for number of tickets to seed (default: 300)
2. Accepts `--threshold <seconds>` for max acceptable time (defaults: 3s for n<=300, 10s for n<=1000)
3. Creates a temporary git repo, initializes ticket system, seeds N ticket directories with CREATE events
4. Runs `ticket list` via ticket-list.sh and measures wall-clock time
5. Outputs timing information to stdout (format: "Elapsed: X.XXs for N tickets")
6. Exits 0 if under threshold, exits 1 if over

## File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-benchmark.sh`

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Tests from task bb93-eeaf go GREEN: test_benchmark_exits_zero_under_threshold, test_benchmark_exits_nonzero_over_threshold, test_benchmark_outputs_timing_info all pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Benchmark script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-benchmark.sh
- [ ] All 3 benchmark tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS' | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Remove RED marker from .test-index for ticket-benchmark.sh after tests pass
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-benchmark.sh.*\[' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index || true
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created ticket-benchmark.sh. All 3 benchmark tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
